title: FLAG-MODEL C1: a Flag model on Plan (net-new) to persist human-review annotations
description: There is NO flag/annotation model in production (verified: no class Flag in plans/models/; ReviewEvent/ReviewEventInput/RevisionRule are the plans built-in review loop, and ActionStepImpediment is orthogonal per services.py - none are draft-element validation annotations). Net-new: a Flag model FK to Plan (CASCADE), carrying element_path (e.g. criteria-1-measurement-0, matching the formset-row addressing collectDraftState/_formset.html use), severity (must_fix | should_review | informational), message, verdict (from A1), is_resolved (default False), created_by_spec, created_at. This is the production-side persistence the workshop draft flags channel (B1) maps onto when the orchestration trio (US-LLM-23/24/25, currently UNBUILT) lands. Requires a DB migration. Atomic gap; prerequisite for C2/C3.
impact: No production model persists per-element review flags, so flags surfaced at generation cannot be carried to the plan for human resolution.
proposed_resolution: Net-new Flag model FK to Plan (element_path, severity, message, verdict, is_resolved, created_by_spec, created_at) + migration.
